title: Cyrtochilum edwardii
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum edwardii is a species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the genus Cyrtochilum, which is a group of orchids native to the Americas. Cyrtochilum edwardii is further classified as a member of the subtribe Cymbidiinae. This orchid species is often found in Central and South America, particularly in countries such as Costa Rica and Ecuador. Cyrtochilum edwardii is a relatively rare species, known for its unique and delicate appearance.
